components.name: claude-tooling
components.responsibility: Claude Code session config: hooks, statusline, notify scripts, local settings, plans, worktree helpers

components.name: cmux-config
components.responsibility: Configuration for cmux and Ghostty terminal (cmux.json, config.ghostty); reload after edits via 'cmux reload-config'

components.name: doom-config
components.responsibility: Doom Emacs configuration; terminal-only daemon (emacsclient -t), reload edits into running daemon instead of restarting

components.name: legacy-tools
components.responsibility: Older standalone utilities kept for reference: ssh expect scripts (sshtools), C++ scratch runner (ccscript), cvs/git-era helpers (oldtools), legacy emacs files (emacs.d)

components.name: macos-setup
components.responsibility: Layered macOS dev-environment provisioning: install.sh bootstrap, setup.py runner, setup.toml package/config definition (layers 0-5: shell, sudo, dev tools, Emacs, shell env, extras)

components.name: markdown-preview-server
components.notes: Port of inline-discussion plugin server (~/workspace/code/inline-discussion/plugins/inline-discussion/server). Port adaptations: Markdown Preview branding, optional --main-jsonl (empty transcript synthesized), doom-city-lights theme in web/app.css. Backend src files are kept verbatim from upstream; sync by 3-way merge for adapted files. Last synced from upstream commit 8473aa8.
components.responsibility: Local Node server rendering a markdown file in the browser with persisted discussion threads; launched from Emacs via my/markdown-preview

components.name: repo-tests
components.responsibility: Shell tests for the emacs wrapper plus fixtures; Emacs lisp tests live next to sources in .doom.d (test-*.el)

open_questions.question: CLAUDE.md documents a 'claude/' directory for Claude code tools and plugin/skills, but no such directory exists (only .claude/). Is CLAUDE.md stale or is claude/ created elsewhere?

patterns.name: layered-setup
patterns.summary: Provisioning is split into ordered layers 0-5 defined in setup.toml; each layer can be run or dry-run checked independently via setup.py -lN / -c

patterns.name: terminal-only-emacs-daemon
patterns.summary: Emacs always runs as a long-lived daemon in terminal mode (emacsclient -t); GUI-only solutions never work. After editing .doom.d files, reload them into the running daemon via emacsclient -e load-file instead of restarting (restart loses session state). Batch tests must call /opt/homebrew/bin/emacs directly, never the ~/tools/emacs wrapper

patterns.name: worktree-implementation
patterns.summary: Source/test/config implementation work happens in git worktrees under ../.my/worktrees/[repo]-[short-title]; specs and plans (docs/superpowers/**, .planning/**) may go directly to main

storage_policy.decision: Context is intended to be versioned and shared through Git.
